model.quantization: NeMo checkpoint; no official Safetensors artifact at the evaluated revision
model.license: CC-BY-4.0; redistribution and commercial use require attribution

runtime.version: NeMo main branch pending the model card's NeMo 2.5 release
runtime.boundary: official Python/NeMo path on Linux and NVIDIA Ampere, Blackwell, or Hopper hardware

energy.notes: No accepted Apple-local runtime reached inference.

engineering_cost.conversion_effort: An owned Apple path would need a new FastConformer and multitask decoder implementation plus checkpoint conversion and timestamp behavior.
engineering_cost.update_cost: The official model currently points at a moving NeMo main branch rather than an immutable Apple-local runtime.
engineering_cost.packaging_cost: The official runtime brings Python, PyTorch, NeMo, and an NVIDIA-oriented native stack; none belongs in the Cuttledoc product artifact.

reproduction.command: No benchmark command: the pinned official model card supports Linux/NVIDIA through NeMo and publishes no accepted Apple-local runtime.

result.blocker: The exact CC-BY-4.0 model is commercially usable, but its supported official runtime is NeMo on Linux/NVIDIA hardware. No official MLX/CoreML path or accepted repository-owned adapter exists, so it cannot enter the Apple-local product bakeoff.
observations: The original canary-1b non-commercial license does not apply to canary-1b-v2.
Word and segment timestamps are model capabilities, but they were not measured on Apple Silicon.
Community MLX implementations remain reference-only under ADR-0005.
